name: Keerthana Purushotham
headline: Software Engineer at AWS Amazon Linux Vulnerability Management focused on CVE response, Linux security posture, and correctness at scale.
tagline: Security + AI + distributed systems, delivered with operational rigor.
summary: I build practical systems where reliability and security are first-class constraints: threat modeling, patch pipelines, FIPS-sensitive workloads, and production automation. My background includes NLP research, statistical modeling, and platform-oriented engineering.
role: Software Engineer, Amazon Linux Vulnerability Management (AWS)
